title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Navigation
feature: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts
scenario: Verify navigation from App Settings to Notifications & Device Alerts and back matches Figma design
steps: Tap the App Settings icon (hamburger menu)
expected: The Notifications & Device Alerts tab matches Figma design (https://www.figma.com/file/IgfSERyqCoRH3Iyejre5oE/Lens-Mobile?node-id=17096%3A132638). After tapping back, the user returns to the App Settings page.
